svg.text: Tier 3: All The Things Wiring Diagram
Everything from Tier 2 + 2nd climate node, 4 LED channels, load cell, reed switch, peristaltic pump, 4 smart plugs, 2nd camera
SporePrint Server | Mosquitto MQTT :1883 | Web UI :3001
ESP32-S3 | USB-C 5V | SHT31 + SCD41 + BH1750 on shared I2C
ESP32-S3 | USB-C 5V | Identical sensor stack: SHT31 + SCD41 + BH1750
Same 12-wire I2C bus pattern as Climate Node 1.
Separate shelf. Same sensor addresses (different ESP32).
ESP32-S3 | USB-C 5V | 4 MOSFET channels + HX711 load cell + reed switch
CH0: FAE Fan -- Full MOSFET Circuit
Same MOSFET circuit. Was Aux in Tier 2.
Also: 3.3V --> VCC, GND --> GND. Load cell wires to E+/E-/A+/A-.
GPIO 35 (INPUT_PULLUP) --> one leg. Other leg --> GND.
Standalone. No GPIO wiring. Shelf A angle.
Standalone. No GPIO wiring. Shelf B angle.
Powers fans (relay), LED strips (lighting), pump via MOSFET drains
All WiFi/MQTT -- no physical wiring. Plug in appliance and go.
Wiring Steps -- Tier 3 Additions (on top of Tier 2)
HX711 Load Cell (NEW on Relay Node):
Same 12V PSU, same MOSFET pattern as Tier 2 channels.
Same MOSFET circuit on Relay Node GPIO 14.
Pump wired in place of fan on drain circuit.
Camera Node 2, Tasmota Plug 3 + 4 -- USB-C / WiFi only.
Tip: Tier 3 adds ~20 new wires on top of Tier 2. The HX711 and reed switch attach to the existing Relay Node ESP32 -- no extra microcontroller needed.
SporePrint | Tier 3: All The Things | github.com/sporeprintai/sporeprint
